Product Details
High-Performance Composite Seals

Advanced composite sealing solutions for equipment facing higher pressure, higher speed, or more demanding media conditions.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

High-Performance Composite Seals

Developed for advanced industrial equipment where standard sealing structures no longer meet durability or friction targets.

CHX High-Performance Composite Seals can combine advanced PTFE-based materials, engineered supports, and elastomer energizers to support demanding pressure, speed, and chemical operating windows.

Advanced Materials

Suitable for designs that require filled PTFE, engineered plastics, or specialized elastomer systems.

Demanding Conditions

Useful in high-load, high-speed, or chemically challenging industrial equipment.

Custom Development

Can be engineered around sealing geometry, installation space, and system life expectations.
